headline: Cintas to Acquire UniFirst in $5.5 Billion Transaction That Expands Service Capabilities, Enhances Workday Solutions and Advances Industry Innovation
summary: CINCINNATI & WILMINGTON, Mass., March 11, 2026--Cintas Corporation (Nasdaq: CTAS) ("Cintas" or the "Company") and UniFirst Corporation (NYSE: UNF) ("UniFirst") today announced that they have entered into a definitive agreement under which Cintas will acquire UniFirst for $310.00 per share in cash and stock, representing an enterprise value of approximately $5.5 billion.1

content.title: Cintas to Acquire UniFirst in $5.5 Billion Transaction That Expands Service Capabilities, Enhances Workday Solutions and Advances Industry Innovation
content.summary: CINCINNATI & WILMINGTON, Mass., March 11, 2026--Cintas Corporation (Nasdaq: CTAS) ("Cintas" or the "Company") and UniFirst Corporation (NYSE: UNF) ("UniFirst") today announced that they have entered into a definitive agreement under which Cintas will acquire UniFirst for $310.00 per share in cash and stock, representing an enterprise value of approximately $5.5 billion.1

headline: Cintas Agrees to Buy Uniform Maker UniFirst in $5.5 Billion Deal
summary: UniFirst shareholders will receive $155 in cash and 0.7720 shares of Cintas stock for each UniFirst share they own, according to a statement on Wednesday.  This represents a combined value of $310 per share based on Cintas’ closing price on Monday.
